entries: Operators interpreted second-person verification as an end-of-shift activity.
Supervisors did not consistently challenge late record completion.
SOP-WH-021 does not assign ownership during shift handover.
The checklist does not require real-time verification initials.
Documentation timeliness is not trended as a warehouse quality metric.
Peak transfer activity overlaps with shift closure and handover.

confirmedRootCause: Material transfer documentation ownership was unclear during shift handover.
